title: lappa bardana subsp. tomentosa
intro: Lappa bardana subsp. tomentosa, also known as woolly lappage or woolly burdock, is a subspecies of the burdock plant (Arctium lappa) native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the lymphatic system, reduce inflammation, and promote detoxification. The health benefits of Lappa bardana subsp. tomentosa include supporting immune function, improving skin health, and reducing the risk of certain diseases, such as arthritis and eczema. Woolly lappage can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or topical salve, and its leaves, roots, and flowers can be used in herbal remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
